CocktailNightsPaytable.PayoutDesc1: Some symbols may occupy 2 to 4 symbols' spaces and each of these symbols will represent as a single symbol during payout calculations.
CocktailNightsPaytable.PayoutDesc2: Wild symbol substitutes for all symbols except Scatter symbol.
CocktailNightsPaytable.PayoutDesc3: Wild symbol appears on reels 2, 3, 4 and 5 only.
CocktailNightsPaytable.FeatureBuyDesc1: Tap on Feature Buy button to open the Feature Buy menu.
CocktailNightsPaytable.FeatureBuyDesc2: Tap on Start button to buy the Free Spins Feature at the price displayed in the Feature Buy menu.
CocktailNightsPaytable.BetWaysDesc1: Bet ways win if the winning symbols are in succession from the leftmost reel to the right.
CocktailNightsPaytable.BetWaysDesc2: Total number of winning bet ways for each symbol are calculated by multiplying the number of adjacent winning symbols on each symbols from leftmost reel to the right.
CocktailNightsPaytable.BetWaysDesc3: The winning symbol payout is multiplied by the number of winning bet ways.
CocktailNightsPaytable.BetWaysDesc4: After the payout of every round is made, all winning symbols will explode allowing the symbols above them to cascade down for a new round.
CocktailNightsPaytable.BetWaysDesc5: Additional winning combination will be tallied in every round until no more winning combination can be tallied.

CocktailNightsRule.Rule1: Cocktail Nights is a 6-reel, 5-row video slot (with an additional reel on bottom of reel 2, 3, 4 and 5) featuring Wilds-on-the-Way and multiplier symbols at the bottom of the reels.

Rule2.value: The game is played with 20 base bet for %{400} ways - %{15625} ways, bet level of 1 to 10 and bet size of %{minChip} to %{maxChip}.
Rule2.comment: Both %{minChip}, %{maxChip} will be replaced by the currency symbol, do not translate. Both %{20} and %{400} will be formatted accordingly, do not translate.
Rule2.example: The game is played with 20 base bet for 400 ways - 15,625 ways, bet level of 1 to 10 and bet size of 0.1 to 10.

Rule3.comment: %{currency} will be replaced by the currency symbol, do not translate.

CocktailNightsRule.Rule4: After the payout of every round is made, all winning symbols will explode allowing the symbols above them to cascade down for a new round.
CocktailNightsRule.Rule5: Additional winning combination will be tallied in every round until no more winning combination can be tallied.
CocktailNightsRule.SymbolRules1: Some symbols may occupy 2 to 4 symbols' spaces and each of these symbols will represent as a single symbol during payout calculations.
CocktailNightsRule.SymbolRules2: Wild symbol substitutes for all symbols except Scatter symbol.
CocktailNightsRule.SymbolRules3: Wild symbol appears on reels 2, 3, 4 and 5 only.
CocktailNightsRule.SymbolRules4: Free Spins Feature is played at the same bet size and bet level as the spin that triggered the Free Spins Feature.

CocktailNightsShared.WildsOnTheWayDesc1: During any spin, some symbols (excluding Wild symbol and Scatter symbol) in reels 2, 3, 4 and/or 5 that occupy 2 to 4 symbols' spaces may have a gold background.
CocktailNightsShared.WildsOnTheWayDesc2: At every new round after the new symbols have cascaded down, any gold-background symbol(s) that is involved in a win in the previous round will be transformed into Wild symbol.
CocktailNightsShared.MultiplierReelDesc1: At the start of any main game spin, the 4 multiplier values below the reels will be set as x2.
CocktailNightsShared.MultiplierReelDesc2: During any main game spin, whenever 1 or more Wild symbols appear on the reels and is involved in a win, the multipliers below those Wild symbols will be totalled. Wins are multiplied by the total multiplier before wins are paid.
CocktailNightsShared.FreeSpinFeatureDesc1: 4 Scatter symbols appearing anywhere will trigger the Free Spins Feature with 10 free spins. Each additional Scatter symbol will trigger 2 more free spins.
CocktailNightsShared.FreeSpinFeatureDesc2: At the start of the Free Spins Feature, the 4 multiplier values below the reels will be set as x2.
CocktailNightsShared.FreeSpinFeatureDesc3: During any free spin, whenever 1 or more Wild symbols appear on the reels and is involved in a win, the multipliers below those Wild symbols will be totalled. Wins are multiplied by the total multiplier before wins are paid.
CocktailNightsShared.FreeSpinFeatureDesc5: The multiplier values below the reels will not reset after the first free spin.
CocktailNightsShared.WinPaidDesc: After wins are paid, the used multipliers will be destroyed and bigger multipliers will cascade in from the right.
